mapper.select: SELECT workflow_instance_id AS "id",project_id AS "projectId",work_order_id AS "workOrderId",configuration_bundle_id AS "configurationBundleId",workflow_definition_version_id AS "workflowDefinitionVersionId",workflow_key AS "workflowKey",workflow_version AS "workflowVersion",definition_digest AS "definitionDigest",status,version,started_at AS "startedAt",completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM wfl_workflow_instance WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND work_order_id=#{workOrderId}

SELECT stage_instance_id AS "id",workflow_instance_id AS "workflowInstanceId",work_order_id AS "workOrderId",stage_code AS "stageCode",sequence_no AS "sequenceNo",status,version,activated_at AS "activatedAt",completed_at AS "completedAt" FROM wfl_stage_instance WHERE tenant_id=#{tenantId} AND work_order_id=#{workOrderId} ORDER BY sequence_no,stage_instance_id
